summary: Backend: 17/17 pytest passed (auth, RBAC, products, barcode, sales+stock dec, expenses, reports, sync dedup). Frontend: app loads, admin login works (form prefilled with demo creds), dashboard renders with name/sales-today/expenses-today/4 action tiles, bottom-tab nav (Inicio/Venta/Catálogos/Gastos/Reportes), Venta shows 6 product cards with photos+stock and tap adds product to a bottom 'Cobrar' bar showing qty/total. CRITICAL ISSUE: most testIDs declared in review_request are MISSING from components, blocking automated UI testing for cart-modal, payment-modal, scanner-modal, catálogos sub-tabs, reportes filters, logout, tab bar, etc. Functionally happy path appears to work but deeper interactions could not be verified through testIDs.

ui_bugs.issue: missing testIDs: login-email, login-password, login-submit, demo-admin/demo-cajero chips not present (only static info card)
missing testIDs: dashboard-name, dashboard-role, dashboard-sales-today, logout-btn (icon top-right exists but no testID)

missing venta-search, venta-scan-btn, cart-fab, cart-modal, cart-checkout, payment-modal, payment-close, scanner-modal, scanner-close. Cart UX uses inline bottom 'Cobrar' bar (no FAB+modal as spec'd). product-card-{id} testIDs DO exist (6 found).
cat-tab-productos/empresas/tiendas/usuarios testIDs missing - could not verify 4-tab structure
gastos-concept, gastos-amount testIDs not verified (gastos-screen also missing)

integration_issues.issue: Could not exercise via testIDs. Bottom 'Cobrar' bar visible after add-to-cart; full payment+ticket flow unverified.
scanner-modal testID missing; barcode lookup endpoint itself works (tested).

integration_issues.flow: Logout + cajero re-login + verify catálogos hidden
integration_issues.issue: logout-btn testID missing; could not automate. Backend role gating verified (cajero 403 on /users, /products POST, /companies POST).

issues: 'Administrador' shown twice (name + role label both render 'Administrador')

action_items: Add testID props (review_request lists) to login form, dashboard header/logout, bottom Tabs.Screen options, venta search/scan/cart FAB, cart modal & buttons, payment modal & buttons, scanner modal & buttons, catálogos sub-tabs, gastos inputs, reportes filters.
Decide cart UX: spec says cart-fab + cart-modal but current impl uses inline bottom 'Cobrar' bar. Either align spec or update testID names.
Optional: add demo-admin/demo-cajero quick-fill chips on login (currently only a static info card with credentials text).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: low_stock threshold hardcoded to <=5 - consider configurable.
server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event startup/shutdown (FastAPI now recommends lifespan).

success_rate.frontend: ~40% (login + dashboard + venta product list verified; deeper modals + reports + catálogos sub-tabs blocked by missing testIDs)

seed_data_creation: None. Used existing seed (admin@pos.com, cajero@pos.com, 1 empresa, 1 tienda, 6 productos). Tests created TEST_-prefixed sales/expenses for dedup checks.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend rock solid. Once main agent adds the listed testID props, re-run UI flows: (1) admin login via login-submit, (2) dashboard tiles + logout, (3) venta -> tap product -> cart-fab -> cart-modal -> cart-checkout -> payment-modal (efectivo + tarjeta) -> ticket, (4) scanner-modal accept barcode 7501055309627, (5) catálogos 4 tabs CRUD, (6) gastos create + appears in list, (7) reportes filters hoy/7d/30d/todo, (8) cajero login -> tab-catalogos hidden.
rca_of_issue: testIDs were specified in the review_request but not implemented in the screens/components. Without them Playwright cannot reliably select React Native primitives in web preview. Functional smoke (visible text + screenshots) confirms the UI exists and basic add-to-cart works.
